realExamSupplementBoundary.statement: 181103 resources can help humans review chapter classification, question-type tags, and study order. They are not original exam papers and must not be used to collapse, split, add, or delete real-exam source rows.

protectedBoundary.publicUse: The website may surface this index as protected-material learning metadata, never as a download or raw-file preview.

checks.detail: every material has chapter, type, and use-goal targets

acceptance.boundary: 181103 materials supplement real-exam review by chapter/type/use-goal routing only. The original real-exam question-count ledger remains owned by the no-merge evidence chain.
